query: SELECT CASE WHEN properties.$current_url LIKE '%gclid%' OR properties.$current_url LIKE '%gad_source%' THEN 'Google Ads (paid)' WHEN properties.$referring_domain = 'www.google.com' OR properties.$referring_domain = 'google.com' THEN 'Google Organic' WHEN properties.$referring_domain = 'www.youtube.com' OR properties.$referring_domain = 'youtube.com' THEN 'YouTube' WHEN properties.$referring_domain = 'chatgpt.com' OR properties.$referring_domain = 'chat.openai.com' THEN 'ChatGPT' WHEN properties.$referring_domain = 'l.instagram.com' THEN 'Instagram' WHEN properties.$referring_domain = 'www.facebook.com' THEN 'Facebook' WHEN properties.$referring_domain = 'www.tiktok.com' THEN 'TikTok' WHEN properties.$referring_domain IN ('$direct', '') OR properties.$referring_domain IS NULL THEN 'Direct' ELSE properties.$referring_domain END AS source, count() AS pageviews, count(DISTINCT properties.$session_id) AS sessions FROM events WHERE event = '$pageview' AND timestamp >= '2026-03-29' AND timestamp <= '2026-04-19' AND properties.$ip != '137.103.50.217' GROUP BY source ORDER BY pageviews DESC
